violations.description: FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (2 pts): Food equipment not properly maintained. Range around the wok noted with extreme food and grease buildup.
CONTAMINATION DURING STORAGE (2 pts): Food noted being stored on the floor and uncovered in walk-in cooler.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
VENTILATION HOOD SYSTEM (1 pts): Vent hood filters noted in need of cleaning.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Vent covers in food prep area noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung.
CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Wire shelves in walk in cooler and spice shelves in kitchen noted not in good repair.
